calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Dean, Esq., counsel for Sally Fraser and Joseph Healy, Successor Co-trustees (appearing by video conference)

The Court reports certain irregularities regarding the payment of attorney fees without Court approval. Mr. Dean acknowledges the same and reports that counsel have returned the fee payment to the Co-Trustees.

Noting the incomplete notice to beneficiaries [failure to advise of the availability of remote appearance], Mr. Dean reports that he has received acknowledgements from all beneficiaries concerning the same and that they waive notice. The Court waives the deficiency.

After discussion, the Court takes the matters under submission with the intent to grant the Petitions with the caveat that the Accounting, due to certain deficiencies, will be accepted but not approved.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Bond
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Confirming Sally Fraser And Joseph Healy As Successor Co-Trustees Of The Diane Frances Walsh Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Dean, via ZOOM, counsel for Daniel Walsh, Petitioner.

The court begins by asking counsel if he believes that anyone intends to petition to be appointed Conservator of both person and estate. Counsel reports that he has communicated with Marta Eisenberg, who represents the co-Conservators in the related Conservatorship matter, and believes that there will be a petition to appoint a Conservator of both person and estate filed at some point. The court then advises counsel that the court is inclined to place this trust under court supervision and issue an order increasing bond to $338,000. Counsel requests a continuance to obtain an increased bond.

The Petition for Order Appointing Co-Trustees, etc., is taken under submission with the intent to grant. A hearing on Status of Bond is set for July 12, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Sally Fraser And Joseph Healy As Successor Co-Trustees Of The Diane Frances Walsh Revocable Trust
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Continued To Jun-14-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dan Dean, via ZOOM, counsel for Daniel Walsh, Petitioner.

The court at the outset advises counsel that the court is unable to appoint a successor trustee until there is a vacancy. Counsel confirms that the plan is to file both a resignation as trustee and a declination to serve as trustee, as well as to submit a new proposed order. The court then advises counsel that it intends to require a bond in the range of $308,000 and take the Trust under Court supervision.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Order Confirming Successor Co-Trustees is continued to June 14, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
